verses.geez:
ወተመየጥነ ፡ ወዐረግነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ ባሳን ፡ ወወፅአ ፡ አግ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ባሳን ፡ ተቀበለነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡
                  ሕዝቡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አድራይን ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትቃተለነ ።

translations.lxx: And we turned and went by the way leading to Basan; and Og the king of Basan came out to meet us, he and all his people, to battle at Edraim.
translations.kjv: Then we turned, and went up the way to Bashan: and Og the king of Bashan came out against us, he and all his people, to battle at Edrei.

verses.geez:
ወይቤለኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኢትፍርሆ ፡ እስመ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ኣገብኦ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ሕዝቡ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ምድሩ ፡
                  ወትገብሮ ፡ ከመ ፡ ገበርካሁ ፡ ለሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ ዘይነብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሔሴቦን ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to me, Fear him not, for I have delivered him, and all his people, and all his land, into thy hands; and thou shalt do to him as thou didst to Seon king of the Amorites who dwelt in Esebon.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto me, Fear him not: for I will deliver him, and all his people, and his land, into thy hand; and thou shalt do unto him as thou didst unto Sihon king of the Amorites, which dwelt at Heshbon.

verses.geez:
ወአግብኦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴነ ፡ ለአግ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ባሳን ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ሕዝቡ ፡ ወቀተልናሁ ፡
                  እስከ ፡ ኢያትረፍነ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ዘርአ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord our God delivered him into our hands, even Og the king of Basan, and all his people; and we smote him until we left none of his seed.
translations.kjv: So the LORD our God delivered into our hands Og also, the king of Bashan, and all his people: and we smote him until none was left to him remaining.

verses.geez:
ወአስተጋባእነ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ አህጉሪሁ ፡ በውእቶን ፡ መዋዕል ፡ ወአልቦቱ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ እንተ ፡ ኢነሣእነ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፤
                  ፷አህጉር ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘአድያማ ፡ ለአርጎ[ብ] ፡ ዘመንግሥቱ ፡ ለአግ ፡ በባሳን ።

translations.lxx: And we mastered all his cities at that time; there was not a city which we took not from them; sixty cities, all the country round about Argob, belonging to king Og in Basan:
translations.kjv: And we took all his cities at that time, there was not a city which we took not from them, threescore cities, all the region of Argob, the kingdom of Og in Bashan.

verses.geez:
ወኵሎን ፡ አህጉር ፡ እለ ፡ ቦንቱ ፡ ጥቅመ ፡ ወነዋኃት ፡ አረፋቲሆን ፡ ወቦንቱ ፡ ዴዳተ ፡ ወመናስግተ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡
                  አህጉረ ፡ ፌሬዜዎን ፡ እለ ፡ ብዙኃት ፡ እማንቱ ፡ ጥቀ ።

translations.lxx: all strong cities, lofty walls, gates and bars; besides the very many cities of the Pherezites.
translations.kjv: All these cities were fenced with high walls, gates, and bars; beside unwalled towns a great many.

verses.geez:
ወሠረውናሆሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ ገበርነ ፡ በሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ሔሴቦን ፡ ወአጥፋእነ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ኅቡረ ፡ ወአንስቲያሆሙኒ
                  ፡ ወደቂቆሙኒ ፡ እስከ ፡ ኢያትረፍነ ፡ ነፋጺተ ፤

translations.lxx: We utterly destroyed them as we dealt with Seon the king of Esebon, so we utterly destroyed every city in order, and the women and the children,
translations.kjv: And we utterly destroyed them, as we did unto Sihon king of Heshbon, utterly destroying the men, women, and children, of every city.

verses.geez: ወኵሎ ፡ እንስሳሆሙ ፡ ወምህርካ ፡ ዘበርበርነ ፡ እምነ ፡ አህጉሪሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: and all the cattle; and we took for a prey to ourselves the spoil of the cities.
translations.kjv: But all the cattle, and the spoil of the cities, we took for a prey to ourselves.

verses.geez:
ወነሣእነ ፡ ምደሮሙ ፡ በውእቶን ፡ መዋዕል ፡ እምውስተ ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ ለክልኤቱ ፡ ነገሥተ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ እለ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡
                  ማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ እምፈለገ ፡ አርኖን ፡ (ዘይብሉ ፡) ወእስከ ፡ አኤርሞን ፤

translations.lxx: And we took at that time the land out of the hands of the two kings of the Amorites, who were beyond Jordan, extending from the brook of Arnon even unto Aermon.
translations.kjv: And we took at that time out of the hand of the two kings of the Amorites the land that was on this side Jordan, from the river of Arnon unto mount Hermon;

verses.geez: ዘይብልዎ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ፊንቄስ ፡ አኤርሞን ፡ ወስንዮርስ ፡ ወአሞሬዎን ፡ ይብልዎ ፡ ሳኒር ።

translations.lxx: The Phœnicians call Aermon Sanior, but the Amorite has called it Sanir.
translations.kjv: (Which Hermon the Sidonians call Sirion; and the Amorites call it Shenir;)

verses.geez:
ኵሉ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ዘ(መንግሥተ ፡ አስ)ሚሶር ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ዘገላአድ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ዘባሳን ፡ እስከ ፡ ኤልከድ ፡ ወኤድራይን ፡
                  ሀገረ ፡ መንግሥቱ ፡ ለአግ ፡ በባሳን ፤

translations.lxx: All the cities of Misor, and all Galaad, and all Basan as far as Elcha and Edraim, cities of the kingdom of Og in Basan.
translations.kjv: All the cities of the plain, and all Gilead, and all Bashan, unto Salchah and Edrei, cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan.

verses.geez:
እንተ ፡ አትረፉ ፡ ረፋይን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ዐራቱ ፡ ዐራተ ፡ ኀፂን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ሀለወት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጽንፎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡
                  ዐሞን ፡ ትስዕ ፡ በእመት ፡ ኑኃ ፡ ወርብዕ ፡ በእመት ፡ ግድማ ፡ በእመተ ፡ ብእሲ ።

translations.lxx: For only Og the king of Basan was left of the Raphain: behold, his bed was a bed of iron; behold, it is in the chief city of the children of Ammon; the length of it is nine cubits, and the breadth of it four cubits, according to the cubit of a man.
translations.kjv: For only Og king of Bashan remained of the remnant of giants; behold, his bedstead was a bedstead of iron; is it not in Rabbath of the children of Ammon? nine cubits was the length thereof, and four cubits the breadth of it, after the cubit of a man.

verses.geez:
ወበርበርናሃ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ በውእቶን ፡ መዋዕል ፡ እምአሮኤር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ አርኖን ፡
                  ወመንፈቃ ፡ ለደብረ ፡ ገላአድ ፡ ወአህጉሪሁኒ ፡ ወሀብክዎሙ ፡ ለሮቤል ፡ ወለጋድ ።

translations.lxx: And we inherited that land at that time from Aroer, which is by the border of the torrent Arnon, and half the mount of Galaad; and I gave his cities to Ruben and to Gad.
translations.kjv: And this land, which we possessed at that time, from Aroer, which is by the river Arnon, and half mount Gilead, and the cities thereof, gave I unto the Reubenites and to the Gadites.

verses.geez:
ወዘተርፈ ፡ እምነ ፡ ገላአድ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ባሳን ፡ መንግሥቶ ፡ ለአግ ፡ ወሀብክዎሙ ፡ ለመንፈቀ ፡ ነገዱ ፡ ለምናሴ ፡
                  ወኵሎ ፡ አድያሚሃ ፡ ለአርጎብ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ባሳን ፡ ዘይትኌለቍ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ረፋይን ።

translations.lxx: And the rest of Galaad, and all Basan the kingdom of Og I gave to the half-tribe of Manasse, and all the country round about Argob, all that Basan; it shall be accounted the land of Raphain.
translations.kjv: And the rest of Gilead, and all Bashan, being the kingdom of Og, gave I unto the half tribe of Manasseh; all the region of Argob, with all Bashan, which was called the land of giants.

verses.geez:
ወእያእር ፡ ወልደ ፡ ምናሴ ፡ ነሥአ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ አድያሚሃ ፡ ለአርጎብ ፡ እስከ ፡ ደወለ ፡ ገርጋሲ ፡ ወመካጢ ፤ ሰመዮን ፡
                  በስሙ ፡ ለባሳን ፡ አውታይ ፡ [እያእር ፡] እእስከ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: And Jair the son of Manasse took all the country round about Argob as far as the borders of Gargasi and Machathi: he called them by his name Basan Thavoth Jair until this day.
translations.kjv: Jair the son of Manasseh took all the country of Argob unto the coasts of Geshuri and Maachathi; and called them after his own name, Bashanhavothjair, unto this day.

verses.geez: ወለማኪር ፡ ወሀብክዎ ፡ ገላአድ ።

translations.lxx: And to Machir I gave Galaad.
translations.kjv: And I gave Gilead unto Machir.

verses.geez:
ወለሮቤል ፡ ወለጋድ ፡ ወሀብክዎሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ገላአድ ፡ እስከ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ አርኖን ፡ ዘማእከለ ፡ ፈለገ ፡
                  አድባር ፡ ወእስከ ፡ ኢያቦቅ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ አድባር ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ዐሞን ።

translations.lxx: And to Ruben and to Gad I gave the land under Galaad as far as the brook of Arnon, the border between the brook and as far as Jaboc; the brook is the border to the children of Amman.
translations.kjv: And unto the Reubenites and unto the Gadites I gave from Gilead even unto the river Arnon half the valley, and the border even unto the river Jabbok, which is the border of the children of Ammon;

verses.geez:
ወአራባ ፡ ወዮርዳንስ ፡ ወሰኖሙ ፡ ለመከናራ ፡ ወእስከ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ አራባ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ አሊቄ ፡ እምአሴዶን ፡ ዘፈስጋ ፡
                  ጽባሒሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Araba and Jordan are the boundary of Machanareth, even to the sea of Araba, the salt sea under Asedoth Phasga eastward.
translations.kjv: The plain also, and Jordan, and the coast thereof, from Chinnereth even unto the sea of the plain, even the salt sea, under Ashdothpisgah eastward.

verses.geez:
ወአዘዝኩክሙ ፡ በውእቶን ፡ መዋዕል ፡ ወእቤለክሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ ወሀበክሙዋ ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ ምድር ፡
                  መክፊልተክሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትሑሩ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ አኀዊክሙ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ሐቅልክሙ ፡ ቅድሜሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ኵሉ ፡
                  ኀያል ።

translations.lxx: And I charged you at that time, saying, The Lord your God has given you this land by lot; arm yourselves, every one that is powerful, and go before your brethren the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: And I commanded you at that time, saying, The LORD your God hath given you this land to possess it: ye shall pass over armed before your brethren the children of Israel, all that are meet for the war.

verses.geez:
ዘእንበለ ፡ አንስትያክሙ ፡ ወደቂቅክሙ ፡ ወአአምር ፡ ከመሂ ፡ ብዙኀ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ብክሙ ፡ ወይነብር ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  አህጉሪክሙ ፡ ዘወሀብኩክሙ ፤

translations.lxx: Only your wives and your children and your cattle (I know that ye have much cattle), let them dwell in your cities which I have given you;
translations.kjv: But your wives, and your little ones, and your cattle, (for I know that ye have much cattle,) shall abide in your cities which I have given you;

verses.geez:
እስከ ፡ አመ ፡ ያዐርፎሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ ፡ ለአኀዊክሙ ፡ ከማክሙ ፡ ወይወርሱ ፡ እሙንቱሂ ፡ ምድረ ፡ እንተ
                  ፡ ይሁቦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ ፡ በማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ትገብኡ ፡ ኵልክሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርስትክሙ ፡
                  ዘወሀብኩክሙ ።

translations.lxx: until the Lord your God give your brethren rest, as also he has given to you, and they also shall inherit the land, which the Lord our God gives them on the other side of Jordan; then ye shall return, each one to his inheritance which I have given you.
translations.kjv: Until the LORD have given rest unto your brethren, as well as unto you, and until they also possess the land which the LORD your God hath given them beyond Jordan: and then shall ye return every man unto his possession, which I have given you.

verses.geez:
ወአዘዝክዎ ፡ ለኢየሱስኒ ፡ በውእቶን ፡ መዋዕል ፡ ወእቤሎ ፡ ርእያ ፡ አዕይንቲክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ለእሉ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ነገሥት ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ይገብር ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በኵሉ ፡ መንግሥት ፡ ኀበ ፡ ተሐውር ፡ አንተ ፡ ህየ ።

translations.lxx: And I commanded Joshua at that time, saying, Your eyes have seen all things, which the Lord our God did to these two kings: so shall the Lord our God do to all the kingdoms against which thou crossest over thither.
translations.kjv: And I commanded Joshua at that time, saying, Thine eyes have seen all that the LORD your God hath done unto these two kings: so shall the LORD do unto all the kingdoms whither thou passest.

verses.geez: ወኢትፍርሁ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይፀብኦሙ ፡ ለክሙ ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall not be afraid of them, because the Lord our God himself shall fight for you.
translations.kjv: Ye shall not fear them: for the LORD your God he shall fight for you.

verses.geez: ወሰአልክዎ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ በውእቶን ፡ መዋዕል ፡ ወእቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And I besought the Lord at that time, saying,
translations.kjv: And I besought the LORD at that time, saying,

verses.geez:
እግዚኦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አንተ ፡ አኀዝከ ፡ ታርእዮ ፡ ለገብርከ ፡ ጽንዐከ ፡ ወኀይለከ ፡ ወጽንዐ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ወልዕልና
                  ፡ መዝራዕትከ ፡ ወመኑ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አምላክ ፡ በሰማይ ፡ ወበምድር ፡ ዘይገብር ፡ በከመ ፡ ገበርከ ፡ አንተ ።

translations.lxx: Lord God, thou hast begun to shew to thy servant thy strength, and thy power, and thy mighty hand, and thy high arm: for what God is there in heaven or on the earth, who will do as thou hast done, and according to thy might?
translations.kjv: O Lord GOD, thou hast begun to shew thy servant thy greatness, and thy mighty hand: for what God is there in heaven or in earth, that can do according to thy works, and according to thy might?

verses.geez:
አብሐኒ ፡ እዕዱ ፡ ወእርአያ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ቡርክት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ እንተ ፡ ሀለወት ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ወውእቱ
                  ፡ ደብር ፡ ቡሩክ ፡ ወአንጢሊባኖን ።

translations.lxx: I will therefore go over and see this good land that is beyond Jordan, this good mountain and Antilibanus.
translations.kjv: I pray thee, let me go over, and see the good land that is beyond Jordan, that goodly mountain, and Lebanon.

verses.geez:
ወተጸመመኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወኢሰምዐኒ ፡ ወይቤለኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኮነከ ፡ አከለከ ፡ ወኢትድግም ፡ እንከ ፡ ተናግሮ
                  ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ቃለ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord because of you did not regard me, and hearkened not to me; and the Lord said to me, Let it suffice thee, speak not of this matter to me any more.
translations.kjv: But the LORD was wroth with me for your sakes, and would not hear me: and the LORD said unto me, Let it suffice thee; speak no more unto me of this matter.

verses.geez:
ዕረግ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእስ ፡ ዘውቅሮ ፡ ወነጽር ፡ በአዕይንቲከ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወመስዕ ፡ ወአዜብ ፡ ወሠረቅ ፡ ወርኢ
                  ፡ በአዕይንቲከ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢተዐድዎ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ።

translations.lxx: Go up to the top of the quarried rock, and look with thine eyes westward, and northward, and southward, and eastward, and behold it with thine eyes, for thou shalt not go over this Jordan.
translations.kjv: Get thee up into the top of Pisgah, and lift up thine eyes westward, and northward, and southward, and eastward, and behold it with thine eyes: for thou shalt not go over this Jordan.

verses.geez:
ወአዝዞ ፡ ለኢያሱ ፡ ወአጽንዖ ፡ ኪያሁ ፡ እስመ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ የዐዱ ፡ ቅድሜሁ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብየ ፡ ወውእቱ ፡ ያወርሶሙ
                  ፡ ምድረ ፡ እንተ ፡ ርኢከ ።

translations.lxx: And charge Joshua, and strengthen him, and encourage him; for he shall go before the face of this people, and he shall give them the inheritance of all the land which thou hast seen.
translations.kjv: But charge Joshua, and encourage him, and strengthen him: for he shall go over before this people, and he shall cause them to inherit the land which thou shalt see.

verses.geez: ወነበርነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ወግር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ፌጎር ።

translations.lxx: And we abode in the valley near the house of Phogor.
translations.kjv: So we abode in the valley over against Bethpeor.
